questions.statement: Which of the following statements is false with reference to nuclear fission and nuclear fusion?
options: Particles must have sufficient energy to penetrate the Coulomb barrier in nuclear fusion /
Chain reaction is associated with nuclear fission /
The energy released in a typical nuclear fusion reaction involving Uranium is 200 MeV /
Fission reaction is responsible for solar radiation /

questions.statement: Which one of the following is the largest composition in biogas?
A good source of energy would be the one-
options: which would do a large amount of work per unit volume or mass /
be easily accessible and most importantly, be economical /
be easy to store and transport /
